flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Milwaukee School of Engineering rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($45.1k → $50.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Milwaukee School of Engineering rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($45.1k → $50.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Milwaukee School of Engineering fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Milwaukee School of Engineering are 60% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($89.1k vs $55.7k).
